prompt: An aerial drone photograph of a sprawling, lush green university campus on a sunny day. In the foreground, a wide multi-lane road with cars passes through a large concrete entrance gate bearing the large white text "ODTÜ METÜ". To the right of the gate, two tall flagpoles fly a Turkish flag and a white flag with a red circular logo. The midground features a long rectangular reflecting pool surrounded by green lawns and pedestrian paths, flanked by various modernist concrete academic buildings. Notable structures include a cylindrical building with red and white horizontal stripes on the left and a large pyramid-shaped building on the right. In the background, a dense city skyline representing Ankara stretches across the horizon, featuring a prominent tall observation tower, backed by rolling hills and mountains under a clear blue sky with scattered white clouds.
